# Geophysics, Applied

**Summary**: The application of geophysical methods to solve practical problems in earth sciences.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] utilized applied-geophysics techniques to develop a 3D SVI algorithm for petroleum exploration.

- [[2023-bargees|Bargees, 2023]] developed an automated tool for seismic data processing to improve near-surface modeling.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] ['seismic-interpretation', 'signal-processing']

- [[2023-bargees|Bargees, 2023]] developed an automated tool for seismic data processing to improve near-surface modeling.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] ['supervirtual-refraction-interferometry']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The method is applicable to active 3D seismic data commonly used in the petroleum industry. ([[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016, p. 18]])

- The HEEH method is a fully automatic, no-preprocessing required solution for zero-phase records. ([[2023-bargees|Bargees, 2023, p. 54]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] Improving signal quality in complex subsurface environments.
